mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT * FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT * FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND LOWER(content) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_user = true ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_user = false ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_messages_partitioned WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
